title: Fix public lease listings not displaying

requirements.summary: Update LeaseListings component to properly fetch and display all lease entries with partial code, split ratio, and styled availability status
acceptanceCriteria: Component fetches all lease listings using the public query method
Each listing displays partial lease code in the specified format
Available status shown in green, Unavailable status shown in red/grayed
Nickname field is NOT displayed on public side

file_operations.description: Update the component to call getAllLeaseListings() backend method without authentication requirements. Ensure the useQuery hook fetches data on mount without requiring Internet Identity login. Update the display logic to show partial lease code in format 'first 4 chars...first 4 chars after last hyphen' (e.g., '2793...2003'), split ratio, and availability status with proper color styling (green for Available, red/grayed for Unavailable). Verify nickname field is NOT displayed in the public listing cards. Ensure proper error handling and loading states are maintained.

requirements.summary: Add copy-to-clipboard button for each lease with disabled state and message for unavailable leases
acceptanceCriteria: Each lease listing has a copy button
Clicking the button copies the full lease code UUID to clipboard
When lease is unavailable, button is disabled and grayed out
Unavailable leases show message 'This code is already in use. Please try another.'
Copy functionality uses JavaScript clipboard API

file_operations.description: Add a copy button to each lease listing card that copies the complete leaseCode UUID to the clipboard using navigator.clipboard.writeText(). When availability is false, disable and gray out the button, and display the message 'This code is already in use. Please try another.' beneath or near the unavailable listing. Include visual feedback (toast or temporary state change) when the code is successfully copied. Use existing shadcn/ui Button component with appropriate variant and disabled state styling.

requirements.summary: Display friendly empty state message when no lease listings are available
acceptanceCriteria: When no leases exist, component displays empty state message
Empty state does not show errors or loading spinners

file_operations.description: Add conditional rendering to display a friendly empty state message 'No leases available yet — check back soon!' when the getAllLeaseListings() query returns an empty array. Ensure this message is styled consistently with the rest of the component and is distinct from loading and error states. The empty state should render in place of the lease listings grid when the data array has length 0.
